commit.message:
Fix double-import issue: pass mcp to register_tools()

Horizon loads server.py via file path, creating a module instance
separate from the package import path. When tools.py imported mcp
via `from lulu_print_mcp.server import mcp`, it got a second mcp
object — tools registered on the wrong instance.

Fix: server.py calls register_tools(mcp) explicitly, tools.py no
longer imports from server. Eliminates circular import entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ui): complete design-token sweep — remove all zinc/emerald hardcoded colors

- Fix 4 broken loading.tsx files (malformed sed output from prior session)
- Replace all remaining text-zinc-*/bg-zinc-*/border-zinc-*/bg-emerald-* with
  --wm-* CSS custom properties across dashboard, jobs, profile, and UI components
- Covers: WidgetGrid, JobOffersPanel, JobScheduler, TimeTracking, ProReviewsPanel,
  LeaveReviewForm, AdvancedSearchFilters, AdminApiKeysPanel, admin widgets,
  ApiKeyCard, ProviderAvailability, Badge (neutral tone), ComplianceBadge
- Every visible surface now uses the design token system exclusively

commit.message:
Auto-detect photo date from EXIF metadata

- Pure JS EXIF parser (no external library, reads first 64KB only)
- Reads DateTimeOriginal (0x9003) from Exif SubIFD (preferred)
- Falls back to DateTimeDigitized (0x9004), then DateTime (0x0132)
- Supports both little-endian (Intel) and big-endian (Motorola) TIFF
- On first file selection, scans files until valid date found
- Updates date input and shows toast "📅 날짜 자동 감지: YYYY.MM.DD"

commit.message:
Strip LD_LIBRARY_PATH from AceStep subprocess environment

Prevents system CUDA libs (e.g. cuBLAS from a newer toolkit in
/usr/local/cuda) from shadowing the versions bundled with PyTorch's
cu128 wheels. Fixes CUBLAS_STATUS_INVALID_VALUE errors on systems
where the installed CUDA toolkit is newer than what PyTorch expects.

v0.5.0: 三大功能升級 — 內容快照重定位 + 驗證 diff + 多 evidence 支援

P0: FileRef 內容快照 + 模糊重定位
- FileRef 新增 content_snapshot 欄位，存建立時的原始內容
- validate() 時 hash 不符會用 snapshot 做 fuzzy search 重定位
- 解決行號偏移導致的假陽性 stale（MOMO 場景 4/4 → 0/4）

P1: validate_detail() 回傳 diff
- 新增 ValidationResult dataclass（含 old_content/new_content）
- Evidence base class 新增 validate_detail() 預設實作
- FileRef 覆寫 validate_detail() 提供實際內容差異

P2: 多 evidence 支援
- MemoryRecord.evidence 支援 Evidence | list[Evidence]
- 新增 evidence_list property 和 evidence_label property
- store.py 序列化/反序列化支援 dict 和 list 格式
- Schema 升級至 v3（向後相容，舊 DB 自動升級）
- validate 取最嚴重狀態（任一 stale 則整條 stale）

四位一體協作：Gemini 架構分析 + Codex 工程方案，142 測試全過

commit.message:
Fix delays: cache GPU client, eliminate double HTTP calls, fix DIRE toggle, reduce patch embeddings

- Cache ColabGPUClient by URL with @st.cache_resource so the same instance
  is reused across Streamlit rerenders instead of being recreated each time
- Replace is_available() + get_health() double HTTP call with a single
  get_health() call that also warms the 30s availability cache
- Fix get_shield to key on colab_url string so the cache correctly
  invalidates when the Colab URL changes (was using _gpu_client which
  Streamlit excludes from the cache key, causing the shield to ignore
  any GPU client updates after first init)
- Fix patch_dire_off monkey-patch to save and restore the original
  _run_ai_manipulation_track so re-enabling DIRE in the sidebar works
- Increase EmbeddingForensics patch stride from 32 to 64 (non-overlapping)
  reducing ResNet50 forward passes ~4x on typical images

commit.message:
feat: 정산 관리자 페이지 Phase 1+2 구현 (9페이지, 11 API)

Phase 1 - MVP:
- 운영 대시보드: KPI 카드 (전표/미수금/미지급/배분율/사용자/작업)
- 시스템 헬스: PostgreSQL/Redis/Server 상태 모니터링
- 정합성 점검: 3대 검증 (입출금-배분, 전표잔액, 상계) + 거래처 잔액 교차검증
- 사용자 계정: 목록/생성/수정 관리
- 감사로그: 고급 필터 + JSON diff 뷰어

Phase 2 - 핵심 관리:
- 비정상 활동 감지: 대량 삭제/야간 활동/대량 금액/마감 변경
- 로그인 이력: 세션 타임라인 + 사용자별 통계
- Worker Job 현황: 작업 분포 + RQ 큐 상태 + 작업 목록
- 기간 마감 관리: 월별 상태 그리드 + 변경 이력

주요 수정:
- helpers.py: PostgreSQL enum 대소문자 수정 (UPPERCASE)
- domain.ts: /settlement/admin 경로 추가
- AppLayout.tsx: admin 역할 전용 사이드바 메뉴 (9항목)
- api.ts: settlementAdminApi (11 함수)

fix: log warnings in behavioral guardrail catch blocks

causing loss streak check, sample size gate, and drift detection to
default to permissive values without any visibility. Now logs at WARN
level so guardrail bypasses show up in Pino output.

Fase 2: CRUD completo backend + telas core mobile

Backend Go (52 novos arquivos, compila sem erros):
- 11 DTOs: granja, galpao, pesagem, mortalidade, racao, agua, checklist,
  mensagem, sanidade, financeiro + response helpers
- 20 handlers: CRUD para todos os recursos (64 endpoints registrados)
  incluindo lotes, pesagens, mortalidade, racao, agua, ambiencia,
  checklists, mensagens, whatsapp, benchmarks, sanidade (vacinacoes,
  medicamentos, visitantes, GTA), financeiro (custos, remuneracao),
  relatorios (PDF/CSV), tecnico, sync offline, upload midia
- 18 repositories: CRUD completo com paginacao, filtros, agregacoes
- 3 services: blockchain (hash chain SHA-256), relatorio (PDF/CSV),
  upload (MinIO com URLs assinadas)
- main.go atualizado com todas as 64 rotas organizadas por grupo

Mobile React Native (25 novos arquivos):
- 2 stores Zustand: loteStore (CRUD lotes/pesagens/mortalidade/racao/agua),
  indicadoresStore (ICA/IEA/GPD/IEP com cache 5min)
- 2 telas Home: produtor (lista lotes + FAB) e tecnico (agrupado por produtor)
- 7 telas Lote: NovoLote, Resumo (12 indicadores + graficos), Pesagens,
  Mortalidade, Racao, Agua, FinalizarLote
- 5 telas formulario: NovaPesagem (amostras dinamicas), NovaMortalidade
  (8 causas), NovoRecebimento, NovoConsumo, NovoConsumoAgua
- 9 componentes: IndicadorCard, GraficoEvolucaoPeso, GraficoMortalidade,
  FormField, DatePickerField, DropdownField, FABMenu, EmptyState, AlertBadge
- Navigation atualizado com todas as rotas reais

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove https://*.supabase.co from CSP connect-src (#54)

Browser never connects to Supabase directly — all access is server-side
via Route Handlers. The wildcard *.supabase.co was unnecessarily broad
and could be abused with the existing unsafe-inline script-src to
exfiltrate data. Restricting to 'self' matches actual usage.

Closes #53

commit.message:
fix: preserve original error details in map_err closures (#590)

Several map_err(|_| ...) closures discarded the original error,
making it difficult to diagnose issues in production. Changed to
map_err(|e| format!("context: {e}")) to preserve error details.

Affected locations:
- merk/src/element/get.rs: 4 element deserialization errors
- grovedb/src/operations/delete/mod.rs: subtree open error
- grovedb/src/replication.rs: subtree construction and key length errors

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
